name: Big Canoe Outdoor Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Big Canoe Outdoor Tennis Center in Jasper, GA! There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, food, water, and lights.

name: Pickens County Recreation Center
description: Pickens County Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jasper, GA. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: The Courts at Bent Tree
description: The Courts at Bent Tree is a place to play pickleball in Jasper, GA. There are 10 asphalt and hard courts. 4 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, lights, trainers or lessons, water, locker rooms, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play.
